name: python3-magic
title: python3-magic
summary: python3 interface to the libmagic file type identification library
description:
python3 interface to the libmagic file type identification library
python-magic is a Python interface to the libmagic file type
identification library. libmagic identifies file types by checking
their headers according to a predefined list of file types. This
functionality is exposed to the command line by the Unix command file.
.
This package provides the Python 3 version of the python-magic module.
